video_prompt: The video features a female singer performing a song with passion and intensity. She is dressed elegantly in a white dress, and her blonde hair is styled in an updo. The setting is a dark stage with focused lighting, creating a dramatic and intimate atmosphere. The singer uses expressive hand gestures and facial expressions to convey the emotion of the lyrics, which include the phrase 'Give me a million reasons.' The background music adds to the overall mood of the performance.
audio_prompt: A woman sings while music plays

speech_prompt.speaker: Female Singer
speech_prompt.text: Give me a million reasons, give me a million reasons
